wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}}
{{Keyword Infobox|Dexterity|2}}
{{KW|Dexterity}} is a {{2|Buffs|Buff}} that increases the {{KW|Block||2}} gained directly from cards. This '''does not''' apply to any other sources of {{KW|Block||2}}, including by Buffs gained from cards.

{{KW|Dexterity}} can be negative, reducing the {{KW|Block||2}} gained from cards to a minimum of 0.

== Sources ==
==== Cards ====
* {{C|Anticipate||2}}: 3(5) {{KW|Dexterity||2}} this turn.
* {{C|Footwork||2}}: 2(3) {{KW|Dexterity||2}}.
* {{C|Abrasive||2}}: 1 {{KW|Dexterity||2}}.
* {{C|Bulk Up||2}}: 2(3) {{KW|Dexterity||2}}.
* {{C|Prowess||2}}: 1(2) {{KW|Dexterity||2}}.
* {{BD|Wraith Form||2}}: At the end of your turn, lose 1 {{KW|Dexterity}}.

==== Relics ====
* {{R|Oddly Smooth Stone||2}}: 1 {{KW|Dexterity}} at the start of each combat.
* {{R|Sparkling Rouge||2}}: 1 {{KW|Dexterity}} at the end of your 3rd turn.
* {{R|Kunai||2}}: Every time you play 3 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks}} in a single turn, gain 1 {{KW|Dexterity}}.
* {{R|Rainbow Ring||2}}: The first time you play an Attack, Skill, and Powers each turn, gain 1 {{KW|Dexterity}}.
* {{R|Helical Dart||2}}: Whenever you play a {{C|Shiv||2}}, gain 1 {{KW|Dexterity||2}} this turn.
* {{R|Belt Buckle||2}}: While you have no potions, you have 2 additional {{KW|Dexterity||2}}.

==== Potions ====
* {{P|Dexterity Potion||2}}: 2 {{KW|Dexterity}}.
* {{P|Speed Potion||2}}: 5 {{KW|Dexterity||2}} this turn.
* {{P|Fysh Oil||2}}: 1 {{KW|Dexterity}}.

==== Monsters ====
<!-- Make consistent with the descriptions in the Enemies database. Hover over the intent templates to see them. -->
*{{M|Lagavulin Matriarch||2}}
** {{Int|Lagavulin Matriarch|Siphon Soul||2}} - Player {{TS|negative||loses}} 2 {{BD|Dexterity||2}}.
*{{M|Hunter Killer||2}}
** {{BD|Tender||2}} - Whenever you play a card, {{TS|negative||lose}} 1 {{BD|Dexterity||2}} this turn.
*{{M|The Forgotten||2}}
** {{Int|Lagavulin Matriarch|Miasma||2}} - Player {{TS|negative||loses}} 2 {{BD|Dexterity||2}}. Gains 2 {{BD|Dexterity||2}}.

== Interactions ==
* {{BD|Block Next Turn||2}} depends on current turn effects, so if {{C|Dodge and Roll||2}} (at 0 {{KW|Dexterity||2}}) is played this turn and {{KW|Dexterity||2}} goes negative, the player will still gain 4 {{KW|Block||2}} next turn.
* Dexterity is applied before multiplicative effects of {{BD|Frail||2}}, {{BD|Unmovable||2}}, {{BD|Shadowmeld||2}}, {{R|Vambrace||2}}, {{R|Pael's Legion||2}}, and {{R|Vitruvian Minion||2}}.
* Dexterity Does not affect block gained from {{2|Relics}} and {{KW|Frost||2}} Orbs.
* Dexterity does not affect block gained from Buffs, including those gained by {{BD|Plating||2}}, {{BD|Rage||2}}, {{BD|Afterimage||2}}, and {{BD|Beacon of Hope||2}}.
